cropChange.description: Emits when the crop area changes.

cropShape.description: The shape of the crop area.

defaultFlip.description: The initial flip state to apply to the image.

defaultRotation.description: The initial rotation to apply to the image in degrees.

defaultZoom.description: The initial zoom factor to apply to the image.

fixedCropArea.description: Whether the crop area is fixed in size and position.

flip.description: The controlled flip state of the image.

id.description: The unique identifier of the image cropper.

ids.type: Partial<{ root: string; viewport: string; image: string; selection: string; handle: (position: string) => string }>
ids.description: The ids of the image cropper elements. Useful for composition.

initialCrop.description: The initial rectangle of the crop area.

maxHeight.description: The maximum height of the crop area.

maxWidth.description: The maximum width of the crop area.

minHeight.description: The minimum height of the crop area.

minWidth.description: The minimum width of the crop area.

nudgeStep.description: The base nudge step for keyboard arrow keys.

nudgeStepCtrl.description: The nudge step when Ctrl or Cmd is held.

nudgeStepShift.description: The nudge step when Shift is held.

rotation.description: The controlled rotation of the image in degrees.

translations.description: The localized strings for the image cropper.

zoom.description: The controlled zoom level of the image.

zoomStep.description: The amount of zoom applied per wheel step.

value.description: The image cropper machine returned by useImageCropper().

position.description: The position of the resize handle.

axis.description: The grid line axis to display.
